ai_coach.headline: Zero data logged today -- no weight, nutrition, sleep, or training entries to verify a Match Day that called for 3500 kcal fueling.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No telemetry synced (sleep, HRV, RHR, body battery all blank), so recovery state is unknown going into tomorrow. Without last night's sleep or today's training log, there's no basis to judge how the match effort landed on the body.
action_plan: Log today's actual food intake now, even retroactively, so the 3500 kcal / 500g carb match-day target can be checked against reality.
Enter today's match/training session in Hevy or the running log to capture load and keep the split's adherence percentage accurate.
Weigh in first thing tomorrow to re-anchor the glide path -- a gap this size risks losing the trend line entirely.
Sync sleep and HRV data tonight so tomorrow's readiness call isn't another blind guess.
If rehydration wasn't tracked today, add the +1.0 L electrolyte allotment tonight given it was a Match Day.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today's Match Day target was 3500 kcal / 215g protein / 500g carbs / 71g fat with 60% of carbs around the pre/post-workout meals -- log what was actually eaten tonight so tomorrow's plan can correct for any shortfall instead of guessing.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight entry today and no glide-path history exists yet, so trend adherence cannot be assessed -- a logged weigh-in tomorrow is needed to start comparing against the 83.0 kg target.
risk_flags: Complete data blackout today (nutrition, weight, sleep, training) on a high-demand Match Day -- adherence cannot be verified at all.
Gym consistency shows 0 of 4 scheduled days logged this cycle, which will distort load-progression tracking if not corrected.

overview.summary: Every core metric -- weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery -- is blank today, so there's no read on how the match load affected the athlete.
overview.suggestion: Sync the wearable and log a same-day check-in tomorrow morning before training so tonight's gap doesn't repeat.

plan.summary: No weight history or glide path entries exist yet, so progress toward the 83.0 kg target can't be scored for today.
plan.suggestion: Weigh in tomorrow morning under consistent conditions to seed the glide-path comparison starting point.

training.summary: Readiness and load are both unlogged, and gym adherence sits at 0 of 4 scheduled days this cycle -- there's no evidence the match-day session happened as planned.
training.suggestion: Log tomorrow's session (or retroactively today's match) in Hevy immediately after training so the next readiness call has real load data to work from.

gym.summary: No recent session data or PRs are on file, leaving the current split and lift priorities unverifiable.
gym.suggestion: Log the next lifting session in full, including working weights, so bar-velocity protection can actually be tracked against prior loads.

sleep.summary: Last night's sleep and the 90-day history are both empty, so there's no basis to judge recovery trend or stress/body-battery drift.
sleep.suggestion: Connect or manually enter tonight's sleep data so tomorrow's readiness assessment isn't another blank.

nutrition.summary: Zero items logged against a 3500 kcal / 215g protein / 500g carb / 71g fat Match Day target means fueling adequacy for today's output is completely unverified.
